source.notes: Style inferred from Researchly public website: clean AI workspace positioning, dark navy copy, bright blue actions, white surfaces, structured research/output emphasis.

identity.positioning: Agent-centered workspace for scalable, citation-ready knowledge work.

typography.fontFamily: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif

diagramStyle.iconStyle: official Azure icons plus restrained line icons
diagramStyle.connectorStyle: blue directional arrows with minimal labels
diagramStyle.groupStyle: light panels, numbered blue badges, strong section headings
